title: WWE Main Event
subTitle: Learn the true story behind WWE's Ruthless Aggression Era, featuring new interviews with John Cena, Batista, Becky Lynch, Triple H, &quot;Stone Cold&quot; Steve Austin and more. This docuseries details the years that followed the Monday Night War and the rise of a new generation of Superstars who would go on to change WWE forever. Episodes cover a variety of topics, ranging from the rise of Cena to the creation of Evolution, Brock Lesnar's dominant career, and WWE's first-ever brand extension.
